productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Benefica Checks Blue Shirt
description: Composition Blue, green, white and orange checked shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, a full front buttoned placket, short sleeves with fold over cuffs, patch pocket on the left chest with embroidered branding and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations wrangler has been clothing the world since 1947 and they're showing no sign of slowing down – this stylish shirt with its bold checks will give you a dashing air, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and leather shoes for that perfect semi-formal look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
